data.title: Virgin Galactic Shares Surge 12.6% in Pre-Market Trading
data.description: Virgin Galactic's stock experienced a significant increase of 12.6% in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, this surge comes amid heightened investor interest and market activity surrounding the company's recent developments. The rise in share price reflects growing optimism about Virgin Galactic's future prospects in the space tourism industry. Investors are closely monitoring the company's progress as it continues to advance its commercial spaceflight operations.

data.title: The Bank of Japan has sent a subtle signal, avoiding a commitment to raise interest rates before its April meeting.
data.description: The Bank of Japan (BOJ) avoided fueling market expectations of a rate hike this month by maintaining a highly nuanced signal in its two quarterly regional economic reports. In another press release summarizing the views of its branch governors, the BOJ stated that looking ahead, amid increased uncertainty, there are concerns about rising prices, particularly energy prices, and their negative impact on corporate profits and private consumption. This commentary suggests that the BOJ is reluctant to commit to a rate hike just three weeks before its next interest rate decision on April 28. Based on overnight swap market pricing, as of Monday, traders considered the probability of a rate hike this month to be around 66%, as the Iranian war could pose a greater upside risk to Japan's already persistently high inflation. The BOJ also stated that many reports indicated businesses continue to pass on rising costs such as labor and logistics to selling prices. Meanwhile, businesses continue to combat consumer inflation fatigue by limiting price increases and strengthening their lineup of low-priced products. (Jinshi)

data.title: Spot gold rose above $4,690 per ounce, up 0.31% on the day.
data.description: Gate data shows that spot gold has risen above $4,690 per ounce, up 0.31% on the day.

data.title: Binance Launches KGST Boost Program with Flexible Earn Products
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced a new campaign for the KGST Boost Program, featuring KGST Simple Earn Flexible Products. This initiative allows users to earn up to 12% APR during the promotion period, which runs from 2026-04-07 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-05-06 23:59 (UTC). The APR includes exclusive Bonus Tiered APRs in addition to Real-Time APR rewards.

The subscription process follows a first-come, first-served basis, with rewards distributed daily. Bonus Tiered APR rewards are credited to users' Spot Accounts the day after accrual begins, while Real-Time APR rewards are accumulated in users' Earn Accounts every minute. The promotion offers a flexible subscription format with a minimum subscription limit of 1 KGST and a maximum of 100,000 KGST. Users can participate by purchasing KGST through various payment methods or depositing KGST into their Binance accounts.

To qualify for rewards, users must complete identity verification during the promotion period, and only master accounts are eligible. Sub-accounts do not qualify for rewards. The availability of products and features may vary by region, and users are responsible for complying with local regulations regarding Binance services. Changes to the Binance Simple Earn Rewards Rate will be announced on the platform as needed.

Rewards are subject to change, with Real-Time APR adjusted every minute. Bonus Tiered APR rewards begin accruing the day after subscription and are distributed daily. Redemption of Flexible Products halts Bonus Tiered APR accrual for the redeemed amount on that day. Users can view their rewards history in the Earn History section. Once the promotion concludes, only Real-Time APR rewards will continue. Binance reserves the right to amend terms and conditions at its discretion.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Stock Futures Show Modest Gains
data.description: U.S. stock futures experienced slight increases, with the S&P 500 futures rising by 0.2%, Nasdaq 100 futures climbing 0.4%, and Dow Jones futures edging up 0.1%. According to Jin10, these movements reflect a cautious optimism among investors as they navigate the current market conditions. The modest uptick in futures suggests a potential positive opening for the U.S. stock market, although broader economic factors continue to influence investor sentiment.

data.title: Indonesia's Budget Deficit to Remain at 2.9% of GDP in 2026, Finance Minister Says
data.description: Indonesia's Finance Minister has announced that the country's budget deficit is expected to remain at approximately 2.9% of GDP in 2026. According to Jin10, this projection is influenced by ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and the impact of fuel subsidies. The minister highlighted that these factors continue to exert pressure on Indonesia's fiscal policy, necessitating careful management to maintain economic stability. The government is closely monitoring the situation and is committed to implementing measures to address these challenges while supporting growth.

data.title: Bank of Korea Nominee Supports Won-Denominated Stablecoin
data.description: Shin Hyun-song, the nominee for the governor of the Bank of Korea, has expressed support for the development of a won-denominated stablecoin. According to NS3.AI, Shin believes that such a stablecoin could coexist alongside a central bank digital currency (CBDC) and deposit tokens. He emphasized that stablecoins could play a significant role in facilitating tokenized-asset transactions and enhancing programmability within a future monetary ecosystem.

data.title: Qatar's LNG Ships Approach Hormuz Strait Amid Conflict
data.description: On April 6, Kpler data reveals that the liquefied natural gas (LNG) carriers 'Rasheeda' and 'Dayyan' are nearing the Strait of Hormuz. According to BlockBeats, if these vessels successfully navigate the strait, it will mark Qatar's first LNG shipment through this route since the onset of the conflict. The passage of these ships is significant given the strategic importance of the Strait of Hormuz in global energy transportation.

data.title: Analyst Reaffirms Buy Rating for Bitcoin Reserve Company Strategy MSTR
data.description: On April 6, investment bank TD Cowen analyst Lance Vitanza reiterated a buy rating for Bitcoin reserve company Strategy MSTR. According to BlockBeats, Vitanza set a target price of $440 for the year 2026.

data.title: Analyst: Reiterates Buy rating on Strategy MSTR with a 2026 price target of $440.
data.description: TD Cowen, a $15 billion investment bank, has reiterated its buy rating on Bitcoin reserve company Strategy MSTR, with a 2026 price target of $440. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Bitcoin's April Rebound Faces Resistance Despite Bullish Divergence
data.description: Bitcoin experienced a rebound of approximately 4% on April 6, reaching a trading price of $69,192. According to NS3.AI, this marks the third bullish divergence within a week, yet the cryptocurrency continues to encounter resistance at the same level. On-chain indicators reveal a decrease in whale accumulation and a lower net position change among long-term holders during this latest bounce.

data.title: Iranian Revolutionary Guard Intelligence Chief Assassinated
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market sources reported on April 6 that the head of the Iranian Revolutionary Guard's intelligence organization, Hadami, has been killed.

data.title: Wells Fargo CEO Highlights Economic Strength Amid Rising Oil Costs
data.description: Wells Fargo CEO Charles Scharf has expressed confidence in the resilience of the U.S. economy, despite consumers facing increased oil expenses of 20%–30%. According to NS3.AI, Scharf noted that while the economy remains robust, the ongoing conflict in Iran could pose a risk to broader economic stability if it persists.

data.title: Circle Mints Record 3.25 Billion USDC on Solana in a Week
data.description: Circle has minted approximately 3.25 billion USDC on the Solana blockchain over the past seven days. According to Odaily, this marks the largest single-week stablecoin minting on Solana for the year 2026.

data.title: A senior Iranian official stated that Iran will not reopen the Strait of Hormuz in exchange for a "temporary ceasefire."
data.description: According to Reuters, a senior Iranian official stated that Iran will not accept deadlines or pressure to force a decision. Iran will not reopen the Strait of Hormuz in exchange for a "temporary ceasefire." Iran believes the United States is not yet ready to achieve a permanent ceasefire.

data.title: Circle minted approximately 3.25 billion USDC on Solana over the past seven days, marking the largest single-week stablecoin minting volume in 2026.
data.description: Data shows that Circle minted approximately 3.25 billion USDC on Solana in the past 7 days, marking the largest single-week minting volume for a stablecoin in 2026. (SolanaFloor)

data.title: Nansen Introduces Cross-Chain Exchange Feature
data.description: Nansen, an on-chain data platform, has launched a new cross-chain exchange feature. According to Foresight News, this update allows users to exchange Base tokens for Solana tokens. This development aims to enhance the platform's functionality and user experience by facilitating seamless token swaps across different blockchain networks.

data.title: Shiba Inu Faces Potential Downside Amid Shibarium's Burn Efforts
data.description: Shiba Inu may experience further declines as Shibarium burned 1 billion SHIB, valued at $15,000, in May 2025. According to NS3.AI, this burn rate is minimal compared to the 549 trillion SHIB currently in circulation, indicating limited impact on the overall supply.

data.title: QuickSwap Discord Server Compromised, Users Warned of Phishing Risk
data.description: QuickSwap has issued a warning to its users following a security breach on its official Discord server. According to NS3.AI, an unauthorized party gained access to the server, posing a phishing threat to community members. The QuickSwap team has advised users to avoid clicking on links, connecting wallets, sending cryptocurrency, or following any instructions from administrators or bots within the server. Efforts are underway to regain control of the compromised server. QuickSwap has assured users that there is no current evidence suggesting that the breach has impacted the core protocol or smart contracts.

data.title: Iran Rejects Pressure for Decision on Hormuz Strait
data.description: Iran has stated it will not accept deadlines or pressure to make decisions regarding the reopening of the Hormuz Strait. According to BlockBeats, Iranian officials emphasized that they would not agree to a temporary ceasefire as a condition for reopening the strategic waterway. Iran believes that the United States is not yet prepared to achieve a permanent ceasefire.
